name: Arden Linen Sofa
description: A low, generous three-seater upholstered in stonewashed Belgian linen. The Arden favours quiet proportions over statement-making — deep enough to read in, restrained enough to disappear into the room.

name: Noma Lounge Chair
description: A sculptural lounge chair in solid oak with a woven paper-cord seat. Scandinavian in temperament: honest joinery, no ornament, and a silhouette that improves the corner it sits in.

name: Haze Floor Lamp
description: A slender brass stem carrying a hand-blown opal glass shade. The Haze gives the kind of light rooms are remembered by — warm, low, and unhurried.

name: Loam Oak Side Table
description: A solid white-oak side table finished in natural hardwax oil. Turned from a single profile, it holds a coffee, a candle, and very little else — which is rather the point.

name: The Calm Interior — Printable Style Guide
description: A 48-page digital guide to editing a room the quiet way — palettes, layout principles, and a printable checklist. Delivered instantly as a PDF you can keep forever.

name: Studio Heavyweight Tee
description: A boxy, heavyweight organic-cotton tee in garment-dyed bone. Cut generously, built to soften with every wash, and quiet enough to wear with anything.
